summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo and adds a migration module. The main.mo sets nextId=51 suggesting 50 pre-populated listings were added, and getAllListings() returns both persistent listings and allListings (the pre-populated array). However, the diff is truncated and the actual 50+ listing data entries are not visible in the diff content. We can infer listings were added but cannot verify all acceptance criteria details due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Every listing has non-empty exteriorImages360 and interiorImages360 arrays with at least 8 URLs each.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and the actual listing data is not visible, so we cannot confirm that all 50+ listings include exteriorImages360 and interiorImages360 arrays with at least 8 URLs each.

missing_requirements.requirement: Every listing has a non-empty imageUrls array with at least one URL.
missing_requirements.reason: The actual listing data is truncated in the diff, so we cannot confirm that all 50+ listings have non-empty imageUrls arrays with valid URLs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Listings span at least 15 different cities across India.
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify city coverage due to truncated listing data in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Listings include a mix of fuel types: Petrol, Diesel, CNG, and at least one Electric.
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify fuel type coverage including CNG and Electric due to truncated listing data.

missing_requirements.requirement: Listings span at least 10 different car makes.
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify make coverage due to truncated listing data in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Listings include a mix of available and sold statuses.
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify status mix due to truncated listing data.

missing_requirements.requirement: All listings are returned by the getAllListings backend query and findable by getListingByRegistrationNumber.
missing_requirements.reason: The getListingById and getListingByRegistrationNumber functions only search the persistent listings map, not the allListings array. Pre-populated listings stored in allListings would not be found by those query functions.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from an old actor state with a sampleListings field to a new actor state with an allListings field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to expand pre-populated car listings in backend/main.mo. No migration module was requested.
